nodes.label: SAE Books MCP server — exposes the REST API as native AI-agent tools.  Runs over
Decorator that registers a tool only when its safety level is     at or below th
Combine @_register + @mcp.tool into one decorator that ONLY calls     mcp.tool()
Return an httpx client with auth headers set.      Token resolution order:     1
Drop empty-string / None values so they're not sent as filters.
Strip keys whose value is None or empty string — for PATCH bodies.
Identify the SAE Books user/company this MCP session is acting as.      Useful a
Fetch the SAE Books REST OpenAPI schema.      Use this when you need to call an
Raw API escape hatch — call any SAE Books endpoint.      Marked ``destructive``
Global search across invoices, contacts, accounts, journal entries.      Args:
Recent change-log entries — what changed when, by whom.      Args:         entit
List contacts (customers / suppliers / both).      Args:         search: free-te
Fetch a single contact by id.
Create a contact.      Args:         name: required, e.g. "Acme Pty Ltd".
Edit a contact. Empty fields are left unchanged.
Soft-delete a contact (sets archived_at).      Reversible — the contact is hidde
Permanently delete a contact. Irreversible.      Most workflows want ``archive_c

Fetch a single invoice with its lines.
Create a DRAFT invoice.      Args:         contact_id: customer UUID.         is
Edit a DRAFT invoice. Empty fields are left unchanged.
Transition DRAFT → AWAITING_PAYMENT and write the journal entries.
Generate a Stripe Checkout payment link for an invoice.
Void a POSTED invoice — writes a reversing JE and marks it VOIDED.
Delete an invoice. DRAFT is soft-archived; POSTED is HARD-DELETED.      Irrevers

Fetch a single bill with its lines.

Void a POSTED bill — writes reversing JE, marks VOIDED.
Delete a bill. DRAFT soft-archived; POSTED HARD-DELETED. Irreversible.

Fetch a single JE with its lines.
